reviews.comment:
Llegué a las 00.20 (viernes) a cargar nafta. Hay sólo 2 surtidores funcionando, de los 10 que están. Recién 00:44 empecé a cargar. Muuucha cola de autos en espera. Pongan mas playeros y habiliten los otros surtidores que los tienen de ADORNO.

(Translated by Google)
I arrived at 12:20 AM (Friday) to fill up. Only two of the ten pumps were working. I only started filling up at 12:44 AM. There was a huge line of cars waiting. They should hire more attendants and open the other pumps that are just for show.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHNjZ2T3VRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una lástima cada vez que quiero cargar combustible tengo que esperar de madia hora a 45 minutos ocuando se dignen de charlar esto ocurre todos los días de 0630 a 0725 opte para no esperar tanto y perder los puntos de cruzarme a shell de Figueroa alcorta pago un poco más pero la atención lo vale una lastima que siendo socio tenga que ir a otro lado ponganse las pilas y cuiden al cliente es  de no recomendar en esa fraja horaria

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame that every time I want to fill up with fuel I have to wait from half an hour to 45 minutes, or even when they deign to chat. This happens every day from 6:30 to 7:25. I decided not to wait so long and lose points by going to Shell in Figueroa Alcorta. I pay a little more, but the service is worth it. It's a shame that, as a member, I have to go somewhere else. Get your act together and take care of the customer. I would not recommend it during that time slot.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHcTUycEtnEAE
